title: Brownfield Redevelopment Specialists and Site Managers
description: Plan and direct cleanup and redevelopment of contaminated properties for reuse. Does not include properties sufficiently contaminated to qualify as Superfund sites.

tasks.text: Identify environmental contamination sources.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate on-site activities for environmental cleanup or remediation projects to ensure compliance with environmental laws, standards, regulations, or other requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify and apply for project funding.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan or implement brownfield redevelopment projects to ensure safety, quality, and compliance with applicable standards or requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Estimate costs for environmental cleanup and remediation of land redevelopment projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct quantitative risk assessments for human health, environmental, or other risks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Design or implement plans for surface or ground water remediation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design or implement measures to improve the water, air, and soil quality of military test sites, abandoned mine land, or other contaminated sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review or evaluate environmental remediation project proposals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare reports or presentations to communicate brownfield redevelopment needs, status, or progress.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect sites to assess environmental damage or monitor cleanup progress.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Maintain records of decisions, actions, and progress related to environmental redevelopment projects.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Coordinate the disposal of hazardous waste.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement plans for the sustainable regeneration of brownfield sites to ensure regeneration of a wider area by providing environmental protection or economic and social benefits.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct feasibility or cost-benefit studies for environmental remediation projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and submit permit applications for demolition, cleanup, remediation, or construction projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Negotiate contracts for services or materials needed for environmental remediation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design or implement plans for structural demolition and debris removal.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design or conduct environmental restoration studies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review or evaluate designs for contaminant treatment or disposal facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide training on hazardous material or waste cleanup procedures and technologies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or implement plans for revegetation of brownfield sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide expert witness testimony on issues such as soil, air, or water contamination and associated cleanup measures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
